positive: Minimalist vector art illustration of a stylized mountain range silhouette at sunset. The scene features sharply defined peaks, scattered with small geometric starburst elements. Use a color palette of deep indigo, soft coral, and muted gold, creating a strong, high-contrast contrast suitable for apparel printing. The composition must be centered and symmetrical, emphasizing clean lines and flat color blocking. The overall aesthetic should be modern, clean, and visually calming, resembling high-end Scandinavian graphic design. Ink bleed and halftone effects are discouraged; the art should be perfect for screen printing.
